# init(_:)

**Initializer**

Creates an immediate scheduler time interval from the given time interval.

## Declaration

```swift
init(_ value: Int)
```

## Creating Scheduler Time Strides

- **init(exactly:)**: Creates an immediate scheduler time interval from a binary integer type.
- **init(floatLiteral:)**: Creates an immediate scheduler time interval from a floating-point seconds value.
- **init(integerLiteral:)**: Creates an immediate scheduler time interval from an integer seconds value.
